name: Sangre Negra
overview: Set in modern day Los Angeles, the Santos family consists of Guillermo Santos Sr., the wealthy patriarch of La Familia de Santos, his glamorous but vindictive wife Laura; eldest son Guillermo Jr., a slick and ambitious criminal defense attorney; Ricky, the half Black, half Hispanic, illegitimate son of Guillermo Sr.; and the youngest of the Santos brothers, Christian, a decorated police officer.

trailers.title: Sangre Negra Official Trailer (2024) | Miniseries | Crime | Drama | Breaking Glass Pictures
